summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of LGA 2026 upgrade. Backend: 29/29 pytest tests passing after fixing 2 ObjectId-serialization bugs. Frontend: admissions 3-step flow, admin portal (login + all 11 sections), student LMS (login + sub-nav), /learn, /about teacher integration, footer links, and DPDP pages all verified.

minor.issue: FIXED — was returning 500 on first-insert path because Motor mutates dict with ObjectId; changed to return serialize(doc).
FIXED — same ObjectId leakage; added '_id' to excluded keys in response dict.

integration_issues.issue: Home page did NOT show admin-created testimonial 'TEST_Reviewer' (admin Testimonials section shows it correctly and GET /api/testimonials?published=true returns it). Possible cause: TestimonialsDynamic component may not be rendering when data loads, or it lazy-loads and our scroll didn't reach it. Needs verification by main agent — public homepage testimonials section integration appears broken.

issues: Spec asked for fixed 7:00 PM IST slot — dropdown actually offers multiple slots (7:30 PM etc.). Functional but mismatches requirement copy.

testid_mismatches_with_spec: application-reference → actual: not present (data shown inside step3-card; ref appears as text)
application-countdown → actual: not present (48:00:00 shown inside step3-card)
tour-consent-error / app-consent-error → not present (zod error rendered inline as text)
step2-start-btn → not present (Step 2 form is always visible below Step 1)
admin-dashboard → not present on dashboard route

nav-enquiries / nav-tour-bookings / nav-applications / nav-testimonials / nav-videos / nav-teachers / nav-students / nav-messages / nav-tickets / nav-page-content / nav-settings → not present (admin sidebar links use only text labels)
LMS section labels: spec said 'Tickets' and 'Profile' — actual labels are 'Support' and 'My Profile'
passed_tests: Backend pytest 29/29 — health, public forms, admin login + bearer guard, tour-bookings flow, applications (ref LGA-YYYYMMDD-XXXX), status by ref/email, testimonials/videos/teachers admin-only POST + public filters, students CRUD + student login + /student/me, messages bidirectional, tickets flow, site-settings public GET (verified Primary Prep ₹1,500/6,000/16,200 and After-School ₹2,000/8,000/21,600), admin-only PATCH

Admissions pricing table: exactly 5 columns (Program, Sessions, Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly); Tiny Tots ₹1,000/mo, Early Learners ₹1,000/mo, Primary Prep ₹6,000/mo (₹1,500 wk / ₹16,200 qtr), After-School ₹8,000/mo (₹2,000 wk / ₹21,600 qtr).
Step 1 tour form: submit BLOCKED without consent (zod 'Please give consent (DPDP Act 2023)' shown, no step1-success); with consent → step1-success appears and POST /api/tour-bookings 201.
Step 2 application form: submit BLOCKED without consent; with consent → step3-card appears, reference 'LGA-20260628-8945' shown, '48:00:00' countdown visible.
Step 3 status check: pasting ref → status-results renders 'LGA-20260628-8945 · Kid Two · Early Learners (4-6) · Pending'.

Admin: /admin redirects to /admin/login; login with admin/LGA@2026Admin opens dashboard with 8 stat cards. All 11 sidebar sections (Dashboard/Enquiries/Tour Bookings/Applications/Testimonials/Videos/Teachers/Students/Messages/Tickets/Page Content/Settings) navigated without page crash or JS errors.
Admin → Testimonials shows the testimonial created via API.
Student LMS: /lms redirects to /lms/login; login with seeded student opens dashboard showing student name + 'Primary Prep' program; Videos/Chat/Dashboard sections nav OK.
/learn page renders TEST_Phonics Intro free video card after admin creates a video with is_free=true.
/about page renders TEST_Guru teacher card after admin creates a teacher with active=true.
Navbar: nav-student-portal-btn visible on desktop, linking to /lms.
Footer: Free Lessons → /learn, Admin → /admin, Privacy Policy, Terms, Grievance all wired.
DPDP pages /privacy-policy and /terms still render (privacy-policy-page and terms-page testids present).
failed_tests: Home page TestimonialsDynamic: did NOT display admin-created testimonial in page body text (verified via getText on full body).
action_items: Investigate Home page <TestimonialsDynamic /> — admin-created testimonial with published=true exists and GET /api/testimonials?published=true returns it, but it does NOT appear on the homepage. Verify the component is mounted on Home.jsx and that it filters/renders correctly.

Optional: align frontend data-testids with the upgrade spec (tour-submit-btn, app-submit-btn, application-reference, application-countdown, step2-start-btn, admin-dashboard, nav-*) so external playbook test cases match.
Optional: rename LMS 'Support' → 'Tickets' and 'My Profile' → 'Profile' to match spec, or update spec.
Optional: restrict tour-slot dropdown to '7:00 PM IST' only if the spec really means a single fixed slot.
critical_code_review_comments: ObjectId leakage pattern: any handler that does `await db.X.insert_one(doc); return doc` will 500 because Motor mutates doc to add ObjectId('_id'). Fixed in /api/newsletter and POST /api/students. Recommend a server-wide convention: always `return serialize(doc)` or build response from explicit fields.
auth.py uses bcrypt + JWT with explicit Bearer header parser; require_admin / require_student split is clean; password hashes are excluded from /students list and /student/me responses.
Admissions.jsx uses zod z.literal(true) for consent on both Step 1 and Step 2 — correct DPDP enforcement; the consent key is stripped client-side before POST.
POST /api/applications generates LGA-YYYYMMDD-XXXX correctly and retries up to 5 times if collision; reference observed: LGA-20260628-8945.
Admin route guard correctly redirects /admin to /admin/login when no token in localStorage.

success_rate.frontend: ~92% — 1 integration miss on Home testimonials section

test_credentials: Admin: admin / LGA@2026Admin (already in /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Test student created during run: lms_ui_c68736@example.com / Lmspass@123 (Active, Primary Prep).
seed_data_creation: TEST_-prefixed rows created: enquiries, contact, tour-bookings, applications (LGA-20260628-8945 etc.), 1 testimonial (TEST_Reviewer), 1 video (TEST_Phonics Intro), 1 teacher (TEST_Guru), 1 student (lms_ui_c68736@example.com). All safe to ignore or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite is /app/backend/tests/test_upgrade_regression.py — 29 tests, all green after _id-leakage fixes. One outstanding integration: Home page TestimonialsDynamic does not render published testimonials (API + admin side both confirmed working). data-testid naming diverges from spec in several places (see testid_mismatches_with_spec list) — main agent should decide whether to update the spec or add the IDs.
rca_of_the_issue: Both 500s on /api/newsletter and /api/students had the same root cause: Motor's `insert_one` mutates the input dict in place by injecting a BSON ObjectId under key '_id'. The handlers were returning that same dict, and FastAPI's jsonable_encoder cannot serialize ObjectId → 500. Fix: wrap responses in `serialize(doc)` (already defined in server.py to pop '_id') OR exclude '_id' explicitly when building the response payload.
